untranslatable_reason: Signal contains subjective confirmation rule ('Do I really want this position?' with low-friction conviction threshold) and bullish divergence detection (stock held above swing low when broader market penetrated its low). These require subjective judgment and comparative market analysis that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The divergence_lookback_bars parameter also suggests multi-bar swing pattern recognition not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated the objective technical conditions: price above 10-period MA for entry and exit on close below 10-period MA. Used close > prev_low as a proxy for swing low support (though true swing low detection is untranslatable). The subjective conviction threshold and bullish divergence logic cannot be mechanically expressed without custom divergence detection and sentiment scoring functions.
